constraints: Pack lifecycle is draft. No implemented translations or runtime artifacts exist yet.
Pack lifecycle is draft. No implemented locale configuration exists yet.
Pack lifecycle is draft but mandated minimum is published. Mandate cannot be enforced until pack reaches published state.
No compliance logic implemented. Compliance frameworks are identified only.
Pack lifecycle is draft but mandated minimum is published. Mandate cannot be enforced until pack reaches published state.
No coding tables or mappings implemented. ICD-10-CM and RVS are identified only.
Depends on regulatory-philhealth-doh which is also draft.
Pack lifecycle is draft. No payer connector implemented.
Required adapter philhealth-eclaims-connector is not available; fallback is integration-pending.
Depends on regulatory-philhealth-doh (draft) and standards-ph (draft), both below required published state.

deferredItems.migrationPath: Requires: (1) distro ADR (VE-DISTRO-ADR-NNNN) adding Filipino as a bounded product language per VE-DISTRO-ADR-0003, (2) lang-fil pack manifest authored and published, (3) Filipino translations implemented in distro and platform. Currently only English, Korean, and Spanish are bounded product languages.

language.scopeBounds: English baseline only. Filipino not yet a bounded product language.
constrainingFactors: Only English is available. Filipino requires distro ADR and bounded-language expansion.
English pack (lang-en) is draft — no runtime artifacts.

regulatory.scopeBounds: UHC Act + Data Privacy Act + PhilHealth eClaims identified. No compliance logic implemented.
constrainingFactors: Regulatory pack is draft. Mandated minimum is published.

payer.scopeBounds: PhilHealth only. Private HMO payers not yet addressed.
constrainingFactors: Payer pack is draft. PhilHealth eClaims adapter not implemented.

nationalStandards.scopeBounds: ICD-10-CM and RVS identified. No coding tables or mappings implemented.
constrainingFactors: Standards pack is draft. Mandated minimum is published.

locale.scopeBounds: en-PH locale only. Date, currency (PHP), and number formatting identified.
constrainingFactors: Locale pack is draft — no runtime locale configuration.

clinicalContent.scopeBounds: No PH-specific clinical content identified yet.
constrainingFactors: No clinical content packs exist for PH.

infrastructure.scopeBounds: No PH-specific infrastructure requirements identified beyond PhilHealth eClaims API connectivity.

operational.scopeBounds: No operational runbooks, training materials, or support documentation for PH market.
constrainingFactors: No operational readiness exists for PH.

gatingBlockers.blocker: Regulatory pack (regulatory-philhealth-doh) is draft with no compliance logic. Must reach at least implemented readiness and published lifecycle before mandate is actionable.
Standards pack (standards-ph) is draft with no coding tables. Must reach at least implemented readiness and published lifecycle before mandate is actionable.
Payer pack (payer-philhealth) has no adapter. philhealth-eclaims-connector is not implemented. Fallback is integration-pending.
No PH-specific infrastructure provisioning exists. PhilHealth eClaims connectivity requires adapter implementation.
No operational documentation, training materials, or support processes exist for PH market tenants.
